plays.playDescription:
(:02) (Shotgun) C.Pennington sacked at NYJ 30 for -13 yards (J.Seau).
Patriots are now the second team in NFL history to begin a season with 14 wins.
Patriots are the third team in NFL history to win 14 consecutive games in a single season. Now tied with '72 Dolphins and '04 Steelers.
3rd time in Patriots 48-year history with 14 or more wins in a regular season.
17th straight regular season win over 2 years, tying '33-34 Bears for 2nd longest streak ever to their 18-game streak 2003-04.

3rd time in Patriots 48-year history with 14 or more wins in a regular season.
17th straight regular season win over 2 years, tying '33-34 Bears for 2nd longest streak ever to their 18-game streak 2003-04.
